name: Tofu/Fruit Pudding
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fresh or Frozen berries (such as strawberries, blueberries, raspberries)
1 cup Fresh orange juice (do not dilute)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a blender or food processor.
2. Blend until smooth and creamy.
3. Chill the mixture before serving.
4. If using bananas, serve immediately as they may brown quickly.
